articles.title: ConsenSys sues SEC and demands ETH be classified as non-security
articles.description: ConsenSys has officially thrown down the gauntlet, filing a lawsuit against the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Their beef? They’re slamming the SEC for what they claim is an “unlawful seizure of authority” over Ethereum. This isn’t just a scuffle over technicalities — it’s a full-on battle to keep Ethereum free from the clutches […]

articles.title: Cardano Founder Charles Hoskinson Reiterates Core Purpose of Cryptocurrency – Here’s What You Need to Know
articles.description: In a heartfelt article shared on X on April 25, Charles Hoskinson, the founder and CEO of Cardano Blockchain, reminded the cryptocurrency world of the real motivation and ideology of digital currencies. He made it clear that their application goes well beyond trade.

articles.title: Algorand courts Python devs in ‘seismic change’
articles.description: The Algorand Foundation touts the network as first to go after pool of 10 million global developers

articles.title: Cryptocurrency Kaspa Falls More Than 3% In 24 hours
Grayscale Unveils Cheaper Bitcoin ETF in Bid to Mimic BlackRock's Success
articles.description: Grayscale launches low-cost Bitcoin ETF, emulating BlackRock's successful strategy

articles.title: Morgan Stanley Considers Allowing Brokers to Recommend Spot Bitcoin ETFs to Clients
articles.description: Morgan Stanley is reportedly exploring the possibility of expanding its sales of Bitcoin ETFs by allowing its approximately 15,000 brokers to actively recommend these products to customers.
